channel.title: La Lune Élevée
channel.description: Recent content on La Lune Élevée

item.title: 20201229_You Will Live a Meaningful Life,if You Follow Me
item.description: Yuta: What do you think a meaningful life? Momi: I can’t give you a clear answer. Momi: Do you want to live a meaningful life? Yuta: Sure. Momi: For what? Yuta: I don’t know. Momi: For whom? Yuta: For me? Momi: That is the most important thing. Momi: Because a meaning varies on the person. Momi: Only humans can understand the meanings. Momi: So, you need a meaning of life. Momi: Don’t you?

item.title: How to Deploy Articles on Hugo Web Site Hosted on GitHub
item.description: How to deploy articles on Hugo website hosted on GitHub Create a deploy.sh script. Shell command should be activated by executing a chmod +x deploy.sh commmand. The following are the contents of the deploy.sh script: #!/bin/sh # If a command fails then the deploy stops set -e printf "\033[0;32mDeploying updates to GitHub...\033[0m\n" # Build the project. hugo # if using a theme, replace with `hugo -t <YOURTHEME>` # Go To Public folder cd public # Add changes to git.
